response.justification: The candidate shows roughly 19 years of hands-on software development across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, plus genuine entrepreneurial experience founding and maintaining an open-source geo-data platform. However, the role is a director-level IC position centered on AI strategy, and the resume demonstrates only recent, tooling-level AI exposure (MCP code generators, agent infrastructure) rather than recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products, or platform-level AI leadership. Career trajectory has stayed at senior/staff execution level with no evidence of advising strategic customers, shaping product direction at scale, or the organizational influence the role requires.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency distributed systems
Entrepreneurial track record: founded and operates an open-source geo-data platform used in production by an NGO network
Strong craftsmanship and knowledge-sharing habits: TDD, open-source libraries, conference talks, and multi-day workshops
concerns: No demonstrated deep AI/ML expertise or shipped AI products; AI involvement is recent and limited to agent tooling
No evidence of director/principal-level scope: strategy setting, customer advisory, or cross-org technical leadership
Cloud experience appears application-level (AWS CDK, Kubernetes deploys) rather than cloud platform strategy or architecture leadership

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI product track record
Depth and breadth of engineering experience exceeding 15-year requirement
No demonstrated strategic or director-level leadership scope
